_comment: User-editable variant shaders backed by custom_shaders/custom_shaders.slang. Each entry adds a new BLS family that slangc compiles from custom_shaders.slang (with wc3_shaders on the include path). A family whose bls_name matches a shipped BLS must provide `template_override` to point at the shipped file it clones for binding metadata — variant shaders must not alter the VS/PS layout, only the shader body.
